backend/main.mo: Motoko actor with a single public function deduplicateComicText that filters duplicate text lines from an input array using a Set, trapping on empty input.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that 13 Spider-Verse comic panel images (panels 7-19, excluding 20) are rendered as static assets, referencing comicData.ts and multiple components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files describing comic-styled UI components, hooks, contexts, utilities, and data structures for a Spider-Verse comic viewer application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color schemes using oklch color space for comic-styled UI elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with title "Spider-Verse Comic Viewer - Into the Spider-Verse" and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component integrating theme provider, query client, error boundary, and all major sections including comic viewer, characters gallery, narration, listening controls, and transcript panel.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: React error boundary component that catches render errors and displays a comic-styled recovery UI with error details and reset/reload options.
frontend/src/components/CharactersGaller: Responsive grid gallery component displaying character artwork cards with hover effects and fallback error handling for missing images.
frontend/src/components/ComicPanel.tsx: Reusable comic panel container component with heavy borders, shadows, animation, and support for default/highlight/credits variants.
frontend/src/components/ComicParts.tsx: Presentational components for comic elements including caption boxes, speech/thought bubbles, SFX text, and scene labels with overlay support for in-panel rendering.
frontend/src/components/ComicViewer.tsx: Main comic viewer component with progressive rendering, chapter structure, deduplication support, timeline mode, missing assets warning, and separate story/credits sections with load-more controls.
Button component that exports the comic to PDF with localization, author name, and timeline mode settings. Handles loading state and displays success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright, attribution to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking, and credits for Spider-Verse IP. Includes internationalization support.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with comic title, subtitle, language selector, and theme toggle button. Uses comic-style masthead styling.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Dropdown select component for choosing the application language. Displays available languages with a globe icon.
frontend/src/components/RepetitionRemova: Toggle switch control for enabling/disabling repetition removal in comic narration. Styled as a comic panel with description.
frontend/src/components/StoryListeningCo: Speech recognition control with start/stop buttons and status badges. Passes transcript updates and errors to parent component.
frontend/src/components/StoryNarrationCo: Text-to-speech narration control with voice selection for different characters (Miles, Jefferson, default). Includes playback controls and derives narration script from localized comic panels.
Scrollable panel displaying speech recognition transcript with word count, copy to clipboard, and clear functionality.
frontend/src/components/VerifiedPanelIma: Image component with error handling that falls back to a placeholder image and reports load failures via callback.
frontend/src/contexts/AppPreferencesCont: React context providing global app preferences (language, author name, timeline mode) with localStorage persistence and BCP-47 language tag validation.
frontend/src/contexts/ComicSettingsConte: React context managing comic-specific settings, currently only repetition removal toggle state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor based on Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useI18n.ts: Hook providing internationalization translation function that memoizes based on current language preference.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMissingIllustratio: Hook that tracks and reports missing illustration assets by collecting filenames of failed image loads, with a 100-item cap for memory safety.
Hook for progressive rendering of comic panels in batches to prevent performance issues, with configurable initial count and increment size.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook for deduplicating comic text lines via the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on success.
Hook wrapping the Web Speech Recognition API for voice input, handling browser compatibility, continuous recognition with interim results, and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesisVoi: Hook that loads and tracks available browser text-to-speech voices, handling asynchronous voice loading via the voiceschanged event.
frontend/src/hooks/useStoryNarration.ts: Hook for narrating story scripts using Web Speech API with per-speaker voice selection, playback controls (play/pause/stop), and configurable rate/pitch.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with comic book-themed design tokens (aged paper, bold colors, sharp edges), custom typography classes, and comic-specific components like speech bubbles and caption boxes.
frontend/src/lib/characters.ts: Character definitions for Spider-Verse characters with IDs, names, and artwork asset paths for Miles, Gwen, Peter variants, villains, and supporting cast.
frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts: Contains structured comic panel data for Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse, organized into chapters with 500+ panels covering the full movie narrative, including sample translations in multiple languages.
frontend/src/lib/comicLocalization.ts: Provides functions to localize comic panels, chapters, and text parts by resolving translations from the data model with English fallback support.
frontend/src/lib/comicModel.ts: Defines TypeScript types and interfaces for the comic data model, including panel types, parts (caption, dialogue, thought, sfx, scene), chapters, and utility functions for text extraction and flattening.
frontend/src/lib/deduplication.ts: Implements deduplication utilities to remove repeated text lines and panel parts across panels while preserving structure and order, plus counting functions.
frontend/src/lib/i18n.ts: Core internationalization module that imports translation dictionaries for six languages, provides translation lookup with variable substitution, language tag normalization, and available language enumeration.
frontend/src/lib/locales/de.ts: German translation dictionary containing UI strings for all application features including narration, listening mode, controls, and PDF export.
frontend/src/lib/locales/en.ts: English translation dictionary serving as the base language with all UI strings for header, narration, listening, controls, viewer, and footer sections.
frontend/src/lib/locales/es.ts: Spanish translation dictionary containing UI strings for all application features including narration, listening mode, controls, and PDF export.
frontend/src/lib/locales/fr.ts: French translation dictionary exporting `frDict` with localized strings for UI elements including header, narration controls, listening mode, transcript, PDF export, and footer credits.
frontend/src/lib/locales/ja.ts: Japanese translation dictionary exporting `jaDict` with localized strings for all UI components, matching the structure of the French locale file.
frontend/src/lib/locales/zh.ts: Chinese translation dictionary exporting `zhDict` with localized strings for all UI components, matching the structure of other locale files.
frontend/src/lib/narration.ts: Provides narration script generation from comic panels, converting panel parts to speakable text with optional speaker metadata and applying deduplication when enabled.
frontend/src/lib/pdfExport.ts: Exports comic panels to PDF by generating printable HTML with title page, chapter sections, panel content, and timeline timestamps, then opening the browser print dialog.
frontend/src/lib/timeline.ts: Utilities for formatting timestamps and ranges aligned to movie runtime (1h 56m), providing HH:MM:SS formatted strings for panel timestamps.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function `cn` that combines clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/types/web-speech.d.ts: TypeScript ambient type definitions for the Web Speech API, including SpeechRecognition interfaces and event types.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions for colors (OKLCH-based), fonts (Bangers display font), border widths, comic-style shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state file for a Spider-Verse Comic Viewer application tracking 13 comic panel images (panels 7-19) to be rendered as static assets. Contains metadata including schema version, image requirements with halftone/bold inking style specifications, and one existing feature for rendering regenerated panel images.
